step.name: export
step.action: Export current AR/AP/cash on hand into the ledger script.

step.name: checklist
step.action: Walk 5 items; mark green/amber/red; write named action per amber/red.

step.name: ledger-entry
step.action: Write one-line ledger entry; append to ledger CSV.

step.name: actions
step.action: Send chase emails + open invoices early; record done-state.

step.name: escalate-if-runway
step.action: If runway < 3 months, trigger contingency plan (advisor call, hiring pause).
